title: ononis serrata proles diffusa
intro: Ononis serrata proles diffusa, also known as Spiny Restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ononis serrata proles diffusa include relieving pain and inflammation, treating digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in different ways.
